steps.title: Apply the transformations
steps.content:
Shifting down $6$ units moves the center to $(-2,-6)$. Doubling the radius gives a new radius of $6$, so
$$r^2=6^2=36=(4)(9)$$

steps.title: Write the equation
steps.content:
Using center $(-2,-6)$ in circle form gives
$$(x+2)^2+(y+6)^2=(4)(9)$$
The answer is A.
